Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4000 "SOLDIEROFFORTUNE-FIREBIRD-C000-4000" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $c000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Soldier of Fortune (Firebird).prg"
Metadata.Notes: This game is really picky on the interrupt and timing setup. Therefore a routine has been added at $C000 which borrows quite a bit of the code found at $C5B1 just before the game starts. Essentially it sets up a temporary IRQ handler, the triggering of which is used to sync everything up.
